    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    GameController - Class in edu.univalle.cincuentazo.controller
    JavaFX controller that binds the FXML view with the Cincuentazo model.
    GameController() - Constructor for class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
     
    GameEventAdapter - Class in edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model
    Empty adapter for game event listeners that only need selected callbacks.
    GameEventAdapter() - Constructor for class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameEventAdapter
     
    GameEventListener - Interface in edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model
    Observer interface used by the model to notify game changes.
    GameException - Exception Class in edu.univalle.cincuentazo.exception
    Base checked exception for recoverable game flow errors.
    GameException(String) - Constructor for exception class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.exception.GameException
    Creates a game exception with a readable message.
    GameException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.exception.GameException
    Creates a game exception with a readable message and cause.
    GameModel - Class in edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model
    Central model that owns all Cincuentazo rules and state transitions.
    GameModel() - Constructor for class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Creates a model with a random generator.
    GameModel(Random) - Constructor for class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Creates a model with a provided random generator for deterministic tests.
    GameStateException - Exception Class in edu.univalle.cincuentazo.exception
    Unchecked exception used for programming errors or invalid state transitions.
    GameStateException(String) - Constructor for exception class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.exception.GameStateException
    Creates a game state exception.
    getActivePlayerCount() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the number of active players.
    getCode() - Method in enum class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Suit
    Gets a compact suit code.
    getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the current player.
    getDeckSize() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the remaining deck size.
    getDisplayName() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Card
    Gets a readable label for logs and tests.
    getDisplayName() - Method in enum class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Suit
    Gets the user readable suit name.
    getHand() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.AbstractPlayer
     
    getHand() - Method in interface edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Player
    Gets a read-only hand snapshot.
    getHumanPlayer() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the human player when the game has started.
    getInitialTableValue() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Card
    Gets the value used when this card opens the table pile.
    getInitialTableValue() - Method in enum class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Rank
    Gets the value used when the card starts the table pile.
    getName() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.AbstractPlayer
     
    getName() - Method in interface edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Player
    Gets the player name.
    getPlayedCardCount(Player) - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the amount of cards played by one player.
    getPlayedCardCounts() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets how many cards each player has played during the current game.
    getPlayers() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets all players in table order.
    getRank() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Card
    Gets the card rank.
    getShortName() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Card
    Gets a compact label for the GUI.
    getSuit() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Card
    Gets the card suit.
    getSymbol() - Method in enum class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Rank
    Gets the compact rank symbol shown on cards.
    getTablePile() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the table pile from oldest to newest card.
    getTableSum() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the current table sum.
    getTopTableCard() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the top table card.
    getWinner() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Gets the winner when the game is over.
